prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your home automation forward
items: Create a comprehensive inventory of all current electronic devices and appliances in your home
Establish a dedicated monthly budget for home automation purchases and ongoing subscriptions
Choose and research your primary home automation ecosystem (Apple HomeKit, Google Home, Amazon Alexa, or Samsung SmartThings)
Schedule a professional home electrical assessment to evaluate your current wiring and power capacity
